title: API and import family classification
purpose: Group imports into analyst-relevant families so Notepad and malware-like samples can be triaged by capability instead of raw symbol lists.
actions: Define import families for process, filesystem, registry, network, crypto, memory, loader, UI, and libc
Add family metadata to import evidence or derived summaries
Surface families in Function Radar reasons and Inspector
Add JSON/text summary hooks for CLI commands

criteria: Dangerous imports retain current radar behavior
Unknown imports fall back to uncategorized
Tests cover Win32 and libc examples
